member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.DependencyInjection
member.summary: Extension methods to register all Infrastructure layer services (EventBus, FileStorage, PluginLoader) with the dependency injection container. Called from the WPF composition root.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.DependencyInjection.AddInfrastructure(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Registers infrastructure services and the plugin loader mechanism.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.BankGenerators.BSPBankGenerator
member.summary: Bank South Pacific (BSP) payment clearing file generator.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.BankGenerators.ANZBankGenerator
member.summary: ANZ Bank payment clearing file generator.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.BankGenerators.WestpacBankGenerator
member.summary: Westpac Fiji payment clearing file generator.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.BankGenerators.BREDBankGenerator
member.summary: BRED Bank payment clearing file generator.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.BankGenerators.HFCBankGenerator
member.summary: HFC Bank payment clearing file generator.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.BankGenerators.KontikiBankGenerator
member.summary: Kontiki Finance payment clearing file generator.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.BankGenerators.BaseBankGenerator
member.summary: Abstract base class implementing IBankFileGenerator, providing placeholder token replacement utilities.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.BCryptPasswordHasher
member.summary: Implementation of IPasswordHasher using BCrypt.Net.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceFileService
member.summary: Infrastructure service for generating FRCS MER and FNPF Contribution CSV file exports.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceJobProcessor
member.summary: Background worker processing compliance jobs asynchronously from database queues. Implements exponential backoffs and writes JSON audit manifests on file generation.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceJobProcessor.Start
member.summary: Starts the background polling loop.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceJobProcessor.Stop
member.summary: Stops the background polling loop.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.CorrelationContext
member.summary: Scoped implementation of ICorrelationContext generating a unique correlation ID per scope.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.EventBus
member.summary: Thread-safe, in-memory implementation of IEventBus. Combines MediatR notification dispatching with dynamic runtime subscriber support.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.EventBus.#ctor(MediatR.IMediator)
member.summary: Initializes the event bus with MediatR.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.BuildVersionProvider
member.summary: Infrastructure implementation retrieving system assembly versions, Git head commits, and system hashes.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.ComplianceMetadataAssembler
member.summary: Infrastructure assembler responsible for gathering compliance validations and summarizing step-level employee traces.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.ComplianceMetadataAssembler.#ctor(FijiPayroll.Application.Services.ComplianceValidationService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.ComplianceMetadataAssembler.AssembleValidationResults(System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollLedgerEmployee})
member.summary: Evaluates the ledger records against statutory FRCS/FNPF compliance rules.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.ComplianceMetadataAssembler.AssembleTraceability(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRunEmployee})
member.summary: Summarizes the execution traces from PayrollRunEmployee records.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.EvidencePackGeneratorService
member.summary: Infrastructure service orchestrating the generation of the compliance evidence pack ZIP, JSON, and PDF summary.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.EvidencePackSignatureService
member.summary: Infrastructure service handling RSA-2048 signature generation and manifest placement.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.EvidencePackSignatureService.#ctor(FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IBuildVersionProvider,FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IUnitOfWork)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.KeyStorage
member.summary: Internal key storage management simulating secure machine keys.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.FileArchiveManager
member.summary: Packages the compliance evidence artifacts into a structured ZIP package using resource-safe streams and rented buffers.
Bundles all evidence pack elements into a single compressed ZIP archive.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.ReportSnapshotRegistry
member.summary: Registry containing metadata definitions and version hashes for all supported SSRS reports.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.ReportSnapshotRegistry.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class. Registers the standard compliance reports.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.ReportSnapshotRegistry.RegisterReport(FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.RegisteredReportDefinition)
member.summary: Registers a report definition in the registry.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.ReportSnapshotRegistry.GetRegisteredReports
member.summary: Gets all registered report definitions.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.ReportSnapshotRegistry.TryGetReport(System.String,FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.RegisteredReportDefinition@)
member.summary: Attempts to retrieve a registered report definition.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.RegisteredReportDefinition
member.summary: Captures the template path and expected parameters for a registered SSRS report.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.RegisteredReportDefinition.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: Captures the template path and expected parameters for a registered SSRS report.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.SignatureVerifierService
member.summary: Infrastructure service verifying cryptographic RSA signatures and manifest boundaries.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.SignatureVerifierService.#ctor(FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ITenantProvider)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.ManifestContent
member.summary: Serializable DTO matching the signature manifest schema.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.ManifestContent.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Serializable DTO matching the signature manifest schema.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.SimplePdfGenerator
member.summary: Simple PDF Generator with zero external dependencies. Produces standard PDF binary output.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.SimplePdfGenerator.GeneratePdf(FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.EvidencePack)
member.summary: Generates a binary PDF document containing the core evidence pack summaries.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.SSRSReportSnapshotService
member.summary: Service to render SSRS reports into deterministic snapshots.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.SSRSReportSnapshotService.#ctor(FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.ReportSnapshotRegistry,System.IServiceProvider)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.SSRSReportSnapshotService.RenderReportSnapshotsAsync(FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.PayrollRun,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Renders snapshots for all registered reports for a given payroll run.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.ReportSnapshotResult
member.summary: Combines the SSRSReportSnapshot domain metadata with the raw PDF file bytes.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.ReportSnapshotResult.Snapshot
member.summary: Gets the snapshot metadata.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.ReportSnapshotResult.PdfBytes
member.summary: Gets the PDF report content bytes.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ComplianceEvidence.ReportSnapshotResult.#ctor(FijiPayroll.Domain.Entities.Payroll.SSRSReportSnapshot,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.EvidencePack.DigitalSignatureService
member.summary: Infrastructure implementation of IDigitalSignatureService. Integrates with KeyStorage to sign and verify compliance payloads.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.FileStorageProvider
member.summary: Provides storage capabilities writing files directly to local disk folders or secure network UNC shares, completely isolated from the database tables.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.FileStorageProvider.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.FileStorageProvider})
member.summary: Initializes the storage provider, setting up base directories.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ImportEngine
member.summary: Implementation of IImportEngine providing Excel template generation, import parsing, validation, and atomic commit operations using ClosedXML.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.ImportEngine.#ctor(FijiPayroll.Domain.Interfaces.IUnitOfWork,FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ITenantProvider,FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ICurrentUserService,FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.IReferenceDataCache)
member.summary: Initializes the import engine.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.LicenseFingerprintProvider
member.summary: Infrastructure implementation of the ILicenseFingerprintProvider. Generates a resilient hardware fingerprint and installation ID.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.MemoryFormulaCache
member.summary: In-memory cache implementation for compiled AST formula rules.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.MemoryFormulaCache.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Memory.IMemoryCache)
member.summary: Initialises a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.NotificationService
member.summary: Infrastructure notification service that routes alerts to application logger diagnostics.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.NotificationService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.NotificationService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.PluginLoader
member.summary: Scans the application folder for dynamically loaded assemblies implementing IModulePlugin, registers their dependencies at startup, and coordinates database updates.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.PluginLoader.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.PluginLoader})
member.summary: Initializes the plugin loader.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.PluginLoader.LoadedPlugins
member.summary: Gets all active, fully registered plugins.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.PluginLoader.DiscoverAndRegisterPlugins(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Discovers dll assemblies in the 'Plugins' subdirectory, instantiates plugin entry points, and triggers their dependency registration logic.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.PluginLoader.InitializePluginsDatabaseAsync(System.IServiceProvider)
member.summary: Triggers database migrations or seeding steps for all successfully loaded plugins.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.SearchContentData
member.summary: Structured data stored in the SearchIndex.Content property.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.SearchContentData.Title
member.summary: Display title.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.SearchContentData.Snippet
member.summary: Display snippet.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.SearchContentData.EmployeeName
member.summary: Employee full name.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.SearchContentData.Department
member.summary: Department name.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.SearchContentData.Notes
member.summary: Notes or branch/position details.

member.name: P:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.SearchContentData.Other
member.summary: Other details (TIN, FNPF, Email, etc.).

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.CachedSearchEntry
member.summary: Hybrid cache search entry holding both raw entity and pre-parsed search content.

member.name: T:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.SearchService
member.summary: Multi-tenant fuzzy search service using SQL table + memory cache hybrid indexer.

member.name: M:FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.SearchService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceScopeFactory,FijiPayroll.Application.Common.Interfaces.ITenantProvider,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{FijiPayroll.Infrastructure.Services.SearchService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of SearchService.
